mapper.select: SELECT * FROM battery_data WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM battery_data WHERE device_uuid = #{deviceUuid} AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM battery_data ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM battery_data WHERE device_uuid = #{deviceUuid} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
